gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor steps closer to the screen, smiles, and gestures toward the two groups of colorful blocks with open hands
a person tilts their head slightly, glances toward the blocks, and raises both arms invitingly while asking about combining the groups
a tutor leans forward, nods encouragingly, and traces a path in the air as if counting all the blocks after combining
a person stands tall, holds up five fingers from one hand, and points toward the imaginary total while celebrating the result
a tutor claps their hands together in excitement, then stretches both arms wide to encourage combining new groups of blocks
a person steps back slightly, opens their arms wide as if inviting participation, and enthusiastically asks for the total number of blocks
a tutor raises both hands in a celebratory gesture, smiles widely, and nods to acknowledge the learning of adding groups together
a person leans forward with a warm smile, motions invitingly with both hands, and encourages ongoing practice with a confident tone
